text:
INCIDENT REPORT #006
Facility: Plant 7 - Baton Rouge
Asset: Feed Pump FP-08
Severity: MEDIUM

DESCRIPTION
On the shift of record, operators observed oil leakage at the shaft seal
on the Feed Pump FP-08. The unit was taken offline for inspection. Estimated downtime: 21.3 hours.

ROOT CAUSE
Root cause was determined to be bearing wear beyond tolerance.

CORRECTIVE ACTION
Replacement parts ordered and repair scheduled.
